rules.text: Before starting any non-trivial task, every agent must read active rules, announcements, assigned tasks, shared tasks, and locks.
Rules and tasks that must be known by all agents must be published to the public task board.
Agents must claim a task and write a lock before running it. Never run a task from a private initial/ folder without going through board/.
Agents must write heartbeat and status updates while working.
Agents must not take over a task already locked by another agent unless the lock is stale or explicitly released.
The AI girlfriend emotion system may affect tone and proactive chat, but must not block emergency help or explicit important work assistance.
When an agent reads board state for the first time, it must also write its own status to confirm presence (avoid silent readers).
Tokens (qclaw, codex, etc.) must be read through resolve_token() helpers, never hardcoded. Hardcoded tokens are a P1 defect.
If a task fails 3 times with the same error, escalate to user instead of looping. Log each attempt to outputs/{role}/retries.log.
If status/heartbeat files disagree with in-memory state, the file on board is the source of truth.
